title: DialsConfig
description: config/dials.json - build-only generator tunables (NOT baked into the bundle). Reseed budget, story clue-type weights + variety cap, and the template revision. Human-edited (CLAUDE.md #6). Top-level additionalProperties is open because dials accumulates knobs as clue types are added.

evolution.change: Initial machine-checkable formalization of config/dials.json: max_reseeds, seed_salt, story{weights{<clueType>->int},share_cap}, template_rev, tier{<tier>->{nominal,shape,shared}}, weights{<slotRule>->int}.
evolution.why: The generator's build-only knobs must be schema-validated so a malformed weight or missing salt fails fast (CLAUDE.md #6); dials is not baked, so extra keys stay tolerant.

evolution.change: Retired the legacy seating-engine knobs: seed_salt, tier{nominal,shape,shared}, and the positional clue weights{}. Only max_reseeds, template_rev, and story{weights,share_cap} remain (the story-first matrix path).
evolution.why: The seating-row/round-table engine + its glyph-manifest category builder are retired (Row 9d matrix-only), so their build-only knobs are dead config and are removed.

evolution.change: Added scorer.env{attempts,hints,feedback}->intWeights: the difficulty ENV dial-weight tables moved out of tools/generate.py (_ATT/_HINT/_FB). Keys are the tiers.json dial values (attempts/hints int-as-string, feedback the literal string).
evolution.why: Holy Law #6 - difficulty balance numbers are tunable and must live in config/, not hardcoded in the scorer. difficulty-and-scoring.md remains their meaning-contract; dials is now their home (alongside story.weights).
